_meta.description: Canonical claim → status → source → module → limitation → gate ledger for Noesis. docs/CLAIM_SOURCE_LEDGER.md and data/source_graph.json are generated from this file plus data/sources.json.

claims.claim_text: The human acts as a low-bandwidth, high-coherence controller over a higher-entropy candidate space.
claims.limitation: Capacity limits are a cognitive-science analogy, not a measured human bitrate.
claims.failure_mode: Presenting the bandwidth abstraction as a biological measurement.

claims.claim_text: The Intent Vector is a compressed control packet that holds the user's intent invariant across passes.
claims.limitation: Cognitive-control analogy; the vector is a text/structural representation, not a neural goal code.
claims.failure_mode: Claiming the intent vector is a model of prefrontal goal representation.

claims.claim_text: The IEV gate w = αR + βV + γP − δK ≥ θ admits a candidate into the next state only if it preserves intent and raises verified precision.
claims.limitation: A computable proxy inspired by process supervision and precision-weighting, not a trained process reward model nor a free-energy computation.
claims.failure_mode: Presenting the proxy functional as a learned verifier or as variational free energy.
claims.forbidden_wording: trained process reward model / free-energy minimization

claims.claim_text: IEV bandwidth is an operational proxy for human validation throughput.
claims.limitation: Not measured neural bandwidth; a throughput heuristic over validation events.
claims.failure_mode: Presenting the proxy as measured PFC bandwidth.

claims.claim_text: Delegated Computational Entropy is candidate-state expansion offloaded to test-time compute, ledgered and then collapsed by the human gate.
claims.limitation: Entropy here is an information-structural proxy over candidate sets, not physical/thermodynamic entropy.
claims.failure_mode: Presenting the entropy proxy as physical entropy.

claims.claim_text: Broadcast and re-entry across the cognitive graph are a structural analogy to the Global Neuronal Workspace.
claims.limitation: A structural analogy only; not biological identity, not a consciousness or brain-measurement claim.
claims.failure_mode: Using GNWT to imply a biological workspace or consciousness in software.
claims.forbidden_wording: global workspace proven in the system / consciousness

claims.claim_text: The pipeline is an active-inference-inspired loop closed through a human, not an autonomous sensorimotor agent.
claims.limitation: Human-in-the-loop analogy; no autonomous perception-action cycle and no free-energy computation.

claims.claim_text: Cognitive dimensionality is an effective-dimensionality proxy (participation ratio over accepted hypotheses) distinguishing useful axes from noise.
claims.limitation: A statistical proxy over candidate representations; not measured brain dimensionality.
claims.failure_mode: Claiming the metric measures neural/brain dimensionality.

claims.claim_text: Cluster quality is a composite proxy over IEV bandwidth, node diversity, latency drag, noise rejection, and artifact convergence.
claims.limitation: A composite heuristic; component weights are engineering choices, not fitted parameters.
claims.failure_mode: Presenting the composite score as a validated quality measurement.

claims.claim_text: Each neurocognitive theory lens is a deterministic text-structural proxy unless an actual computation is implemented.
claims.limitation: Lenses are labelled 'deterministic-proxy'; they do not implement the underlying theories.
claims.failure_mode: Claiming a lens computes the theory it is named after.

claims.claim_text: EIIC (Extrapolated Intentional Identity Core) is a speculative trajectory construct, framed by possible-selves and narrative-identity psychology, with no predictive validation.
claims.limitation: Research hypothesis with no validation; must never be presented as predictive of identity or destiny.
claims.failure_mode: Presenting EIIC as predicting a person's future or destiny.

claims.claim_text: The category / reality-map layer is conceptual engineering over the user's terms, not metaphysical discovery.
claims.limitation: Conceptual refactoring of terms; no civilizational essentialism and no claim of metaphysical truth.
claims.failure_mode: Reading category outputs as objective metaphysics or civilizational essence.

claims.claim_text: Artifact stability is software verification, regression, and rollback discipline over generated artifacts.
claims.limitation: Validated by tests and schemas; structural correctness, not semantic truth of content.
claims.failure_mode: Claiming schema-valid artifacts are semantically true.

claims.claim_text: The Evidence Bundle is software observability, reproducibility, and provenance for each run.
claims.limitation: Records what ran; does not certify the truth of the recorded content.
claims.failure_mode: Treating bundle provenance as proof of correctness.

claims.claim_text: High-stakes or ambiguous outputs route to a human; final responsibility stays with the human.
claims.limitation: Offloading can create dependence; the tool advises, the human decides.
claims.failure_mode: Letting the tool make high-stakes decisions autonomously.

claims.claim_text: A deterministic guard blocks AGI / consciousness / therapy / diagnosis / destiny overclaims from output.
claims.limitation: Substring/heuristic guard; reduces but does not eliminate overclaim risk.
claims.failure_mode: Relying on the guard as a complete safety proof.

claims.claim_text: Noesis externalizes the user's metacognitive monitoring/control loop; it supports human metacognition rather than possessing its own.
claims.limitation: An externalized monitoring/control analogy; the tool has no metacognition of its own.
claims.failure_mode: Claiming the tool is metacognitive rather than supporting the user's metacognition.

claims.claim_text: The vertical loop is a critique-and-refine pass over candidates, in the self-refine / reflexion style.
claims.limitation: A refinement proxy; self-critique is bounded by the base model and needs external verification.

claims.claim_text: Multi-node candidate generation and critique use test-time agent-orchestration patterns.
claims.limitation: Orchestration is a structural pattern; more agents do not by themselves improve reasoning.
claims.failure_mode: Claiming multi-agent orchestration guarantees better reasoning.
